description: Autokey cipher on 73-char column mask extract (PT/CT feedback × Vig/Beau/VBeau × AZ/KA × 9 keep-col variants + progressive key + running key). Different CT and shifted crib positions vs raw 97.
key_finding: Max 6/24 across 46,170 configs. Autokey on 73-char column mask extract (shifted cribs at 13-25, 47-57) produces zero signal. This is genuinely different from autokey on raw 97.
